description: Print information about faces. If < range > is not supplied, the requested information is listed for all faces in the current building blocks set.

6.0.reason: Not listed in the official FLAC3D 6.0 command indexes.

7.0.description: Print information about faces. If <range> is not supplied, the requested information is listed for all faces in the current building blocks set.

keywords.name: blocks
keywords.description: Print block IDs for each face.

keywords.name: edges
keywords.description: Print edge IDs for each face.

keywords.name: extra
keywords.description: Print FISH extra information. A valid index i must be supplied.

keywords.name: information
keywords.description: Comprehensive information is listed, including groups, extras, area of the face, and normal vector.

keywords.name: nodes
keywords.description: Print IDs for the nodes of the face(s).
